name: project-creation — Wire New Project button: API endpoint + create modal
objective: The /projects page has a 'New Project' button that is purely decorative — no @click handler, no modal, no API route. This workstream wires it end-to-end: POST /api/vault/projects writes a project.md + default board + 4 columns into the vault, and the UI shows a create modal with a name field.
exit_criteria: POST /api/vault/projects accepts { name } and creates: projects/{id}.md, boards/{boardId}.md, columns/{todo,in-progress,review,done}.md under vault/shared/.
The new project + board + columns are immediately visible in GET /api/vault/read-model.
New Project button on /projects opens an inline modal with a single 'Project name' input.
Submitting creates the project and refreshes the list without a full page reload.
Clicking an existing project still navigates to /projects/[id].
